query:
UPDATE providers SET
            trust_score  = GREATEST(0.0, LEAST(5.0, trust_score + $1)),
            success_rate = CASE
                WHEN jobs_completed > 0
                THEN (success_rate * (jobs_completed - 1) + $2) / jobs_completed
                ELSE $2
            END,
            updated_at   = now()
        WHERE provider_id = $3
